column3: Does the plan cover cosmetic surgery?

Does the plan provide Minimum Essential Coverage?
Name two services generally excluded from coverage.
Name two services listed under “Other Covered Services.”
Explain the difference between excluded services and “other covered services.”
column4: Excluded services are not covered at all while “other covered services” may be covered with limitations (e.g.hearing aids & bariatric surgery).

column5: Mia: $500 — Joe’s deductible is higher due to additional service-specific deductibles."
